name: Tentacles
description:
A tentacle bot I originally made for myself but decided to make public at 4am…Idk what I was on that time but I swear I wasn’t right in the head

“Can I use a trans persona?”

“Yes, you can.”

“Can I turn it into anypov/malepov?”

“…Sure? I literally forgot this bot existed and tbh you guys can just mess with it at this rate 😭”

“CAN YOU-“

“No :] (unless it has something to do with minor changes/improvements, sure)”

— - —

God I just made this bot for fun not thinking anyone would see this, even USE IT- Sorry for the dudes who felt offended reading that old desc, I wasn’t right in the head as you’ve read at the top of this ridiculous desc. At the end it’s just something for y’all to mess with, go wild ~(^ ^~ )
